summary: Short, focused session: shipped the SCREEN SHAKE that topped session 185's open threads — the first swing of the flagged JUICE PASS. Used the Squirrel Eiserloh trauma model: events add trauma (0..1) that decays every frame, and shake = trauma² × SHAKE_MAX with a fresh random direction per frame. The squared curve is the whole point — single-brick taps are ~0.5px (barely there) while a big explosive combo chain saturates trauma to 1 and slams the full 16px, closing the '1-combo and 9-combo feel the same' gap Moti called out. Trauma sources scale by feel: each brick break adds SHAKE_BRICK + combo×SHAKE_COMBO (deeper chains hit harder), explosive detonations + losing a life add big fixed hits. render() translates the whole scene by the offset with a solid backdrop fill first so a hard shake never bares an unpainted canvas edge; HUD/overlays are React DOM so they stay rock-steady. tsc -b + vite build green (67.77 kB gzip). Committed af9beba, tree clean. Moti wants to bank hit-stop + explosion FX for next session — 'i want clean one.'
commits: af9beba feat: screen shake — trauma-based juice that scales with combo + blasts
open_threads: PUSH PENDING: main is 1 commit ahead of origin/main (af9beba not pushed yet)
JUICE PASS part 2 (Moti's explicit NEXT-SESSION pick): HIT-STOP — a few frames of freeze on big impacts (explosive detonation / high combo) so heavy hits read as heavy; pairs with the shake
Dedicated explosion FX — a shockwave ring on detonation instead of reusing per-brick particle bursts (companion to hit-stop)
Shake tuning dials if playtest wants more/less: SHAKE_MAX (master), SHAKE_DECAY (snappiness); Moti to eyeball via npm run dev (no browser tool on Claude side)
GIFT_DROP_CHANCE still 0.38 (elevated; comment flags normal ~0.18) — decide ship value
Skull odds ~11% via GIFT_WEIGHT — playtest to confirm feel
*.tsbuildinfo tracked in git — could gitignore + untrack
Untracked test/ dir in the tree — decide keep / commit / ignore
Combo polish: rising-pitch sound + canvas ×N! flare
Bigger veins: enemies, boss final stage, initials leaderboard, mobile touch, MUSIC (SFX only), more gifts (sticky/laser)
